commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d8aac7bff7b2b5968dfd3cc36b2e9a859caf9ea6)
commands.review_summary:
Adds `appServer.turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` to the Codex plugin config schema, manifest metadata, runtime option resolution, and focused app-server config/turn-watch tests.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +4. Total +26 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR exposes a new public config path for an existing direct runtime option. Source inspection confirms current main accepts the direct option but not the plugin config key.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because an automated repair cannot supply the contributor's real-runtime evidence or decide whether this new public config knob should be accepted.

target.title: fix(codex): expose assistant completion idle timeout config
target.author: marchpure

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
